title: Enhanced Quarries
description: Fabric's mod that add Quarry, Filler
body:
# Required Mods - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/reborncore - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/libblockattributes # Overview this is mod that add Quarries, Fillers

Forge has Quarry Plus, but the Fabric version is only 1.17.
However, I wanted to use a machine like BC with Fabric 1.16, so the reproducibility is low, but I made it.
I also made Filler too.
This mod likes BuildCraft, Additional Enchanted Miner(Quarry Plus), Compact Engine, and Akuto Engine.

There is no engine, so use a Tech Reborn, Mechanix generator.

(Marker range specification is not visible due to my lack of skill...)
Modules enclosed in red are used for Quarry. (Bedrock Break Module is also available in Filler.)

Machines added here can be paused by sending a redstone signal.  

The pump is an experimental implementation. (The specifications are completely different from the original one.)

Optimum-based Quarry is designed to work on low-spec PCs.
For large-scale open pit mining, it is recommended to use Optimum type Quarry because a normal quarry may cause a delay. 


 
This mod works independently except that it is premised on Tech Reborn, but we recommend that you install the following mods.
- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/techreborn
- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simplepipes
- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pipeplus
- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pipe
- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mechanix
 
Please check the recipe at JEI.

The recipe for the Filler module can be found on the Github Wiki.
